{"parts":[{"content":"**Confirmed!** Only found 1 skill (`brainstorming`) but obra/superpowers has many more (systematic-debugging, test-driven-development, etc.). The hardcoded list is incomplete.

### Phase 4: Implementation

**Root cause:** Cannot list directory contents via raw.githubusercontent.com.

**Fix:** Use GitHub API for directory listing.","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"edit_file","args":"{"target_file": "/home/workspace/Skills/skills-importer/scripts/import_skill.py", "operations": [{"operation":"replace_block","old_block":"    def list_skills(self, owner: str, repo: str) -> List[str]:\n        \"\"\"List all skills in a repository\"\"\"\n        branch = self.get_branch(owner, repo)\n        structure = self.detect_repo_structure(owner, repo)\n        \n        if structure == \"root\":\n            # Single skill at root\n            skill_url = f\"{self.base_url}/{owner}/{repo}/{branch}/SKILL.md\"\n            if self.fetch_url(skill_url):\n                return [repo]  # Use repo name as skill name\n            return []\n        \n        # Multiple skills in skills/ directory\n        skills = []\n        skills_base_url = f\"{self.base_url}/{owner}/{repo}/{branch}/skills\"\n        \n        # Try to fetch a directory listing by checking common skill names\n        # Since we can't list directories via raw.githubusercontent.com, we'll try common patterns\n        common_skills = [\n            \"frontend-design\", \"backend-api\", \"database-design\", \"testing\", \n            \"deployment\", \"monitoring\", \"security\", \"documentation\", \"ci-cd\",\n            \"react-best-practices\", \"web-design-guidelines\", \"react-native-guidelines\",\n            \"composition-patterns\", \"vercel-deploy-claimable\", \"brainstorming\",\n            \"research\", \"writing\", \"analysis\", \"automation\", \"integration\"\n        ]\n        \n        for skill_name in common_skills:\n            skill_url = f\"{skills_base_url}/{skill_name}/SKILL.md\"\n            if self.fetch_url(skill_url):\n                skills.append(skill_name)\n        \n        return skills","new_block":"    def list_skills(self, owner: str, repo: str) -> List[str]:\n        \"\"\"List all skills in a repository using GitHub API\"\"\"\n        branch = self.get_branch(owner, repo)\n        structure = self.detect_repo_structure(owner, repo)\n        \n        if structure == \"root\":\n            # Single skill at root\n            skill_url = f\"{self.base_url}/{owner}/{repo}/{branch}/SKILL.md\"\n            if self.fetch_url(skill_url):\n                return [repo]  # Use repo name as skill name\n            return []\n        \n        # Use GitHub API to list directory contents\n        api_url = f\"https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents/skills?ref={branch}\"\n        try:\n            response = requests.get(api_url, timeout=30, headers={\"Accept\": \"application/vnd.github.v3+json\"})\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            contents = response.json()\n            \n            # Filter to directories that contain SKILL.md\n            skills = []\n            for item in contents:\n                if item.get(\"type\") == \"dir\":\n                    skill_name = item[\"name\"]\n                    # Verify it has SKILL.md\n                    skill_url = f\"{self.base_url}/{owner}/{repo}/{branch}/skills/{skill_name}/SKILL.md\"\n                    if self.fetch_url(skill_url):\n                        skills.append(skill_name)\n            \n            return sorted(skills)\n            \n        except requests.RequestException:\n            # Fallback to checking common skill names if API fails\n            skills = []\n            skills_base_url = f\"{self.base_url}/{owner}/{repo}/{branch}/skills\"\n            common_skills = [\n                \"frontend-design\", \"brainstorming\", \"systematic-debugging\",\n                \"test-driven-development\", \"writing-plans\", \"verification-before-completion\"\n            ]\n            for skill_name in common_skills:\n                skill_url = f\"{skills_base_url}/{skill_name}/SKILL.md\"\n                if self.fetch_url(skill_url):\n                    skills.append(skill_name)\n            return skills"}]}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01YUWdUUU3JvyaY7stpHoznc","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":79715,"cache_write_tokens":495,"cache_read_tokens":79219,"output_tokens":1228,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":495,"cache_read_input_tokens":79219,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":1228}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T13:09:21.598374Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01WdzzyyGtY58GNpgStbgdmx","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"b5d629f5-0776-4cb7-95b8-5ef539a9db09","metadata":null}
